title: Storyweald Foundry Item — gear
description: The full Foundry Item document Storyweald pushes for a piece of gear (weapon/armor/consumable/utility/artifact). Extracted from StoryTeller's Item model + SWN item exporter (#861).

img.description: StoryTeller Item.image (only pushed when the URL has a real file extension).

description.description: HTML. Composed by the exporter from StoryTeller history + features + duration.

cost.description: StoryTeller Item.cost (IntAttr, base currency; unified to int on 2026-07-08).

item_type.description: StoryTeller Item.item_type (derived property; canonical routing enum).

category.description: StoryTeller Item.category (free-text descriptive subtype, e.g. 'Energy Weapon').

consumable.description: StoryTeller Item.consumable (model field; NOTE: page_data() exposes it under the typo key 'consumbale').

attunement.description: StoryTeller Item.attunement (#837). NOT in page_data() today — wiring requires an exporter change (T4).

requirement.description: StoryTeller Item.requirement (#837, the hard gate to wield). NOT in page_data() today — exporter change (T4).

material.description: StoryTeller Item.material. NOT in page_data() today — exporter change (T4).

size_class.description: StoryTeller Item.size_class. NOT in page_data() today — exporter change (T4).
